description: You are preparing a batch of promotional videos for a legacy in-flight entertainment (IFE) system. Transcode the source videos in /home/ga/Videos/Source/ (promo_destinations.mp4, promo_rewards.mkv, and promo_safety.mp4) to MPEG-TS format (.ts) with H.264 video at 720x480 resolution and Mono (1 channel) AAC audio at 44.1 kHz. Burn the compliance subtitle from /home/ga/Documents/compliance_overlay.srt directly into the video streams. Save the outputs to /home/ga/Videos/IFE_Ready/ preserving the original base filenames. Create a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Documents/ife_manifest.json with the batch_id "IFE-PROMO-001", target_system "Legacy Seatback V2", and a processed_files list containing the original_file, output_file, and audio_channels for all three videos.
